title: Hiring Production Engineer at Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies:
Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jain Irrigation Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
